title: Fix overlapping UI elements in test interface

requirements.text: Fix the scrolling behavior in the reading test layout so that the passage and questions panels can scroll independently without UI elements blending together

quotes: Free to scroll. Here the passage and the question next and previous button and the Powered by sayem Ahtesham is also blended.

acceptanceCriteria: The passage section scrolls independently without affecting other UI elements
The question section scrolls independently without affecting other UI elements
No visual overlap occurs between the passage content and navigation buttons
No visual overlap occurs between the question content and navigation buttons

requirements.text: Ensure the Next and Previous navigation buttons remain visible and properly positioned without overlapping with the passage or question content

quotes: the question next and previous button and the Powered by sayem Ahtesham is also blended

acceptanceCriteria: Next and Previous buttons are always visible and clickable
Buttons maintain consistent positioning regardless of content scroll state
Buttons do not overlap with scrollable content areas

requirements.text: Fix the footer displaying 'Powered by Sayem Ahtesham' so it does not blend or overlap with the passage, questions, or navigation buttons

quotes: the Powered by sayem Ahtesham is also blended

acceptanceCriteria: Footer text is clearly visible and readable
Footer does not overlap with any scrollable content
Footer maintains proper spacing from navigation buttons
Footer remains in a fixed position at the bottom of the viewport

constraints: Maintain the existing 2-column layout for Reading tests
Preserve all existing functionality in TestInterface.tsx and ReadingTestLayout.tsx
Do not modify the backend or data structures
nonGoals: Changing the overall design or color scheme
Modifying the test submission or scoring logic
Adding new features beyond fixing the layout issues
